response.overview: A wealthy and successful businessman leads a comfortable and luxurious life, focused entirely on his work and ambitions. One day, fate brings him face-to-face with a charming and graceful woman, and what begins as a casual encounter soon blossoms into deep affection. Captivated by her simplicity and warmth, he finds himself falling in love for the first time, believing she could be the one who completes his life. However, destiny takes an unexpected turn when he learns that the woman he loves is already in love with his closest friend. Torn between friendship and love, he faces an emotional conflict that tests his loyalty, heart, and the true meaning of relationships.
response.title: Modh
